title: IFB A251017444 OneStream Implementation Services
name: IFB A251017444 OneStream Implementation Services
statement_of_work: The California Governor¿s Office of Emergency Services, requires implementation and configuration services for the Software as a Service (SaaS) platform, OneStream. The system will support budget development, financial tracking, reporting, position control, grant management, and compliance oversight.
dept: California Governor's Office of Emergency Services (Cal OES)
description: The California Governor¿s Office of Emergency Services, requires implementation and configuration services for the Software as a Service (SaaS) platform, OneStream. The system will support budget development, financial tracking, reporting, position control, grant management, and compliance oversight. The solution will replace manual processes, reduce reliance on spreadsheets, and provide a controlled, auditable financial management environment.
